{{Quote|That should keep them busy for a while, trying to accumulate more weapons. It should give us an edge in apprehending most of them before they can prepare an assault against any of our military sites.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TSI" />}}
The '''Royal Security Forces marines raid on Mauler base''' was an operation carried out by [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] marines under the command of [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]] some time during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
{{Quote|We have need of someone to infiltrate the Mauler Stronghold by force and destroy their weapons cache.|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TSI" />}}
The [[Maulers]] was one of the greatest threats to the citizens of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:TSI" /><ref name="SWG:TSE" /> When an unknown number of RSF agents, who had been involved in the successful [[Raid on the Skaak Tipper Hideout|raid]] on the [[Skaak Tippers]] island just of the coast of [[Kaadara]], were placed in the command of Typho by [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]],<ref name="SWG:Ttb" /> Typho offered a number of job in the local branches of RSF in [[Keren/Legends|Keren]]. One of these was to work for the [[Royal Marine Regiment]] and take part in a two-part operation staged against the Maulers.<ref name="SWG:TSI" /><ref name="SWG:TSE" />

==The operation==
===Stronghold infiltration===
{{Quote|Great work with those explosives. Are you ready to do some more work for me?|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TSI" />}}
Both stages of the operation were directed at the [[Mauler Stronghold]] not too far from the city of [[Keren/Legends|Keren]]. The first stage consisted in the RSF marines confiscating four weapons caches that were scattered over the base. In the process several Maulers were killed.<ref name="SWG:TSI" />

===Stronghold elimination===
[[File:Mauler_Stronghold.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The [[Mauler Stronghold]].]]
{{Quote|Good work on the weapons cache, but now I need you to eliminate some of the more dangerous members of the Mauler organization.|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TSE" />}}
Having successfully returned to Typho with the caches, the Marines were ordered back to the base, this time to assassinate four Mauler officers: the chief tactician [[Zolo Sartain]], the [[Chief of Security/Legends|chief of security]] [[Yarick Tempol]], the [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Xylan Kee'choap]] and the mystic [[Walus Mutin]]. The mission was a success, and the marines may possibly have killed some of the officers' aides as well as other members of the Maulers' ranks.<ref name="SWG:TSE" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|Impressive work against the Mauler higher-ups.|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TSE" />}}
A crippling blow to the Maulers, this operation did not stop them completely, and the RSF agents were dispatched on a handful of missions directed at the Maulers,<ref name="SWG:TPW" /><ref name="SWG:TMPW" /> before being placed under the command of [[Pooja Naberrie/Legends|Pooja Naberrie]].<ref name="SWG:RtPN">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Report to Pooja Naberrie|Naboo}}</ref>
